Metadata.SourceFile: Quest for the Holy Grail, The.tap
Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x7000 "THEQUESTFORTHEHOLYGRAIL-7000" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Quest for the Holy Grail, The.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
This is a BASIC game with the main program being loaded at $0801. Therefore an init routine has been added at $7000 to setup the necessary BASIC pointers and execute the RUN command to start the game program. To avoid the bad statement at $0801, the routine sets the pointer to the beginning of the BASIC area ($2B/$2C) to $0850 so as to start the program at line 1.
Also zeroed out the following memory ranges as they contained an unnecessary repeating memory block:
$6BF0 - $73FF $8BF0 - $BEFF
Note: to dump the game, set a breakpoint at $C000
